what_changed: Updated the required CI checkout step from actions/checkout@v4 to actions/checkout@v6.
Updated the required CI Python setup step from actions/setup-python@v5 to actions/setup-python@v6.
Updated the repository governance test so future workflow edits keep the Node 24-compatible action majors.
pr-evidence/upgrade-ci-node24-actions/pr.why: The required PR quality gate should not depend on deprecated Node 20 action runtimes; keeping CI action majors current protects the automated merge gate used for every package-generalization PR.
